reviews.review_description: Monkgame used to be a game where I would want to play everyday, but ever since the summer 2025 update, it's not been that way. The reason is because we had no updates for almost a WHOLE YEAR and I was focusing myself to get on and make content for the game because I didn't want to see it die. When Monk around came out I thought I would be a fresh new start at the start of the game but then the game lost all of the cool ideas that it had in beta testing and soon was discontinued. Now that Monkgame is back, I think (Means in my opinion) that it sucks, you should just updated the old version with cool new maps and content to play with but no you completely restarted and some how made it worse to the point that I just want I it to just go back to when the game had no updates. So what I'm saying is Tristantron (Owner) you need to lock in and either make the new version 100x better or just update the old version of monkgame so the game and be fun again. + Don't even try to defend this version cause I MILLION of reasons why it is and also I gave it a 3 just cause that old monkgame was a 5/5 and the new one it 1/5.

reviews.review_title: The moderators and community  are bad
reviews.review_description: I had just downloaded the game and within 2 minutes of playing this guy false accused me of saying the n word when we were playing glass bridge. This guy had no evidence and i had to switch to call to app as I was in a call  to actually say it wasn’t me . He said he is friends with a moderator and reported me to the discord apparently and said i will 100% get banned. I haven’t checked yet, but if I’m banned, this game is rubbish. He said i will definitely get banned though.

developer_response.body: Hi, I'm sorry this happened. We take impersonation very seriously around here and if there is anything we can do to help permanently ban the person trying to scare you we would be happy to help. Also for the record, you will not be getting banned for this as he lied according to what you are saying. Join the MonkGame discord (https://discord.gg/r3efEWbKjW) and we will help you find who that person is so they can be evicted from the community entirely. Also please consider removing this review or at least changing the rating. It would help a lot : )

developer_response.body: Hi, I completely understand your frustration. We have had a massive cheating issue which has been recently resolved. Most of the cheaters are gone and none of them can kick people anymore. Also those were not the mods or admins sexually harassing people, those were the cheaters. Again, I have banned most of the cheaters and i continue to ban them when we see them. And for your information, We log all of the cheater's IP data which has made it extremely hard for them to ban evade. Either way, I am sorry for how they treated you and I would love to see you try the game again now that the cheaters have no power anymore. Also could you please change the review rating? This is not accurate to the game whatsoever and we try our best to pump out new features that you might enjoy. If you have any questions please join the discord and ping a moderator https://discord.gg/CRs25JvD2J. Anyways, I hope this clears things up for ya : )

developer_response.body: I have banned most of the cheaters. I also log the cheaters IP data so it makes it very hard for them to ban evade. I also have been banning their vpns at rapid speed which makes it really hard for them to play. On top of that, they can no longer kick people anymore. Only actual staff can kick people now : )

reviews.review_description: I was trying to play but they kept on kicking me I hate it I can't even have fun! When ever I play I just get mad and really sad because I just want to play but they kick me one star.

developer_response.body: Hi piper, I am very sorry about the cheaters. I have seen many videos of them hurting the community. Either way the cheaters are mostly all banned now and NONE of them are able to kick anymore. Only actual staff can kick now which means you wont be spam kicked anymore. Again, I am deeply sorry for how those people treated you. It is not okay and we do not tolerate that behavior whatsoever. Please consider changing your review and coming back to the MonkGame community. We would love to have you back in the game having a good time with friends!
